repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: The current failure shows 'class optiling::Ca6k04593CustomTilingData has no member named set_totalLength' (and similar setter errors) in TilingFunc. All five selected memories address the exact same pattern: opbuild fails in TilingFunc because the TilingData class lacks setter methods (set_totalLength, set_tileLength, etc.) and the fix is to assign directly to members instead of using setter calls. Although the ops differ (ca6k_00188, ca6k_00262, ca6k_00288, ca6k_00397, ca6k_00240), the root cause and solution are identical, making these highly relevant for the repair.
